<script type="8d7f69882c45d3b9bf27fac2-text/javascript">function setREVStartSize(e){
			//window.requestAnimationFrame(function() {
				window.RSIW = window.RSIW===undefined ? window.innerWidth : window.RSIW;
				window.RSIH = window.RSIH===undefined ? window.innerHeight : window.RSIH;
				try {
					var pw = document.getElementById(e.c).parentNode.offsetWidth,
						newh;
					pw = pw===0 || isNaN(pw) || (e.l=="fullwidth" || e.layout=="fullwidth") ? window.RSIW : pw;
					e.tabw = e.tabw===undefined ? 0 : parseInt(e.tabw);
					e.thumbw = e.thumbw===undefined ? 0 : parseInt(e.thumbw);
					e.tabh = e.tabh===undefined ? 0 : parseInt(e.tabh);
					e.thumbh = e.thumbh===undefined ? 0 : parseInt(e.thumbh);
					e.tabhide = e.tabhide===undefined ? 0 : parseInt(e.tabhide);
					e.thumbhide = e.thumbhide===undefined ? 0 : parseInt(e.thumbhide);
					e.mh = e.mh===undefined || e.mh=="" || e.mh==="auto" ? 0 : parseInt(e.mh,0);
					if(e.layout==="fullscreen" || e.l==="fullscreen")
						newh = Math.max(e.mh,window.RSIH);
					else{
						e.gw = Array.isArray(e.gw) ? e.gw : [e.gw];
						for (var i in e.rl) if (e.gw[i]===undefined || e.gw[i]===0) e.gw[i] = e.gw[i-1];
						e.gh = e.el===undefined || e.el==="" || (Array.isArray(e.el) && e.el.length==0)? e.gh : e.el;
						e.gh = Array.isArray(e.gh) ? e.gh : [e.gh];
						for (var i in e.rl) if (e.gh[i]===undefined || e.gh[i]===0) e.gh[i] = e.gh[i-1];
											
						var nl = new Array(e.rl.length),
							ix = 0,
							sl;
						e.tabw = e.tabhide>=pw ? 0 : e.tabw;
						e.thumbw = e.thumbhide>=pw ? 0 : e.thumbw;
						e.tabh = e.tabhide>=pw ? 0 : e.tabh;
						e.thumbh = e.thumbhide>=pw ? 0 : e.thumbh;
						for (var i in e.rl) nl[i] = e.rl[i]<window.RSIW ? 0 : e.rl[i];
						sl = nl[0];
						for (var i in nl) if (sl>nl[i] && nl[i]>0) { sl = nl[i]; ix=i;}
						var m = pw>(e.gw[ix]+e.tabw+e.thumbw) ? 1 : (pw-(e.tabw+e.thumbw)) / (e.gw[ix]);
						newh =  (e.gh[ix] * m) + (e.tabh + e.thumbh);
					}
					var el = document.getElementById(e.c);
					if (el!==null && el) el.style.height = newh+"px";
					el = document.getElementById(e.c+"_wrapper");
					if (el!==null && el) {
						el.style.height = newh+"px";
						el.style.display = "block";
					}
				} catch(e){
					console.log("Failure at Presize of Slider:" + e)
				}
			//});
		  };</script>

<nav id="site-navigation" class="nav with-counters with-mobile-menu" data-mobile-menu-second-click-link="">

    <div class="mobile-overlay menu-mobile-overlay">
        <div class="overlay"></div>
        <div class="close-bar">
            <button aria-label="close" class="icon-button -overlay-button">
                <i class="icon">
    <svg class="default" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <path d="M14 1.41L12.59 0L7 5.59L1.41 0L0 1.41L5.59 7L0 12.59L1.41 14L7 8.41L12.59 14L14 12.59L8.41 7L14 1.41Z"></path>
    </svg>
</i>
            </button>

            
    <button class="icon-button search-global fixed dynamic-typo btn-round-light vc_hidden-sm vc_hidden-xs" data-nav-search="true">
	    <i class="icon">
	    	<svg class="default" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M12.0515 11.3208H12.8645L18 16.4666L16.4666 18L11.3208 12.8645V12.0515L11.0429 11.7633C9.86964 12.7719 8.34648 13.3791 6.68954 13.3791C2.99485 13.3791 0 10.3842 0 6.68954C0 2.99485 2.99485 0 6.68954 0C10.3842 0 13.3791 2.99485 13.3791 6.68954C13.3791 8.34648 12.7719 9.86964 11.7633 11.0429L12.0515 11.3208ZM2.05832 6.68954C2.05832 9.25214 4.12693 11.3208 6.68954 11.3208C9.25214 11.3208 11.3208 9.25214 11.3208 6.68954C11.3208 4.12693 9.25214 2.05832 6.68954 2.05832C4.12693 2.05832 2.05832 4.12693 2.05832 6.68954Z"></path></svg>

	    	</svg>
	    </i>
	</button>

        </div>
        <div class="holder">

			<main id="main" class="site-main">
			<article id="post-18600" class="post-18600 page type-page status-publish hentry">
	<div class="entry-content">
		<div class="wpb-content-wrapper"><div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid demo-main-screen vc_custom_1572968482345 vc_row-has-fill"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_inner vc_row-fluid vc_row-o-equal-height vc_row-flex"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-6 vc_col-md-4"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="vc_empty_space"   style="height: 10px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div><div class="ohio-widget heading clb__heading -left" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce221932"  data-aos=fade-up data-aos-duration=350>
	
	
			<div class="subtitle">
			DIGIMETRIQ'S		</div>

		
	
	<h1 class="title">
				AUTO BLOGGING					</h1>

	
		
</div><div class="vc_empty_space  clb__spacer"   style="height: 30px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div><div class="ohio-text-sc" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce221acb"  data-aos=fade-up data-aos-duration=350 data-aos-delay=100>
	<ul>
<li>Are you tired of writing articles?</li>
<li>Are you spending a lot on content writers?</li>
<li>Is it difficult to manage your PBN?</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>You don&#8217;t need to anymore!</strong></p>
<p>Now get <strong>automated content</strong> completely hands-free.</p>
<p><strong>Readable</strong> and <strong>Grammatically Correct</strong> Articles <strong>Daily</strong>.</p>
</div><div class="ohio-text-sc" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce221b24"  data-aos=fade-up data-aos-duration=350 data-aos-delay=300>
	<p><strong>Powered by OpenAi&#8217;s GPT 3</strong></p>
</div><div class="vc_empty_space"   style="height: 10px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div><div class="vc_empty_space  clb__section_spacer"   style="height: 90px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-6 vc_col-md-8 vc_col-has-fill"><div class="vc_column-inner vc_custom_1620074175556"><div class="wpb_wrapper"></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row-full-width vc_clearfix"></div><div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid vc_custom_1572968494774 vc_row-has-fill"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="ohio-widget service-table -left" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce222408"  >

	<h3 class="title">
				How It Works					</h3>

	
		
		<div class="subtitle">
			What actually happens in the back-end		</div>
	
		
</div><div class="vc_empty_space"   style="height: 10px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div><div class="ohio-widget horizontal-accordion" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce2234d3" >
	<div class="horizontal-accordion-item" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce223587">
	<div class="accordion-body">
		<div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_inner vc_row-fluid vc_custom_1643902297842 vc_column-gap-1"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner vc_custom_1574283217297"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="vc_empty_space"   style="height: 8vh"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div><div class="vc_separator wpb_content_element vc_separator_align_center vc_sep_width_100 vc_sep_pos_align_center vc_separator_no_text" ><span class="vc_sep_holder vc_sep_holder_l"><span style="border-color:rgb(136,136,136);border-color:rgba(136,136,136,0.8);" class="vc_sep_line"></span></span><span class="vc_sep_holder vc_sep_holder_r"><span style="border-color:rgb(136,136,136);border-color:rgba(136,136,136,0.8);" class="vc_sep_line"></span></span>
</div><div class="ohio-widget process" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce224225" >
    <div class="heading">
        <div class="process-number subtitle">Step 1.</div>
        <h3 class="process-headline title">List of Keywords</h3>
    </div>
    <p class="process-description">Digimetriq's AI Writing Module is powered by Autoblogging.ai that writes from scratch. The main requirement from your end is a <b>list of keywords</b>.<br />
<strong>Credit Packs</strong> - To get started, you'll need to purchase credit packs and spread them over different sites. Credits don't expire.<br />
A Google sheet will be maintained between both the parties.<br />
So, Get your list of keywords/ title handy. Let AI Take over from here.</p>
</div></div></div></div></div>
	<div  class="wpb_single_image wpb_content_element vc_align_left">
		
		<figure class="wpb_wrapper vc_figure">
			<div class="vc_single_image-wrapper   vc_box_border_grey"><img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" width="640" height="410" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20640%20410'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="vc_single_image-img attachment-large" alt="" title="oh__img103_small-768x492" data-lazy-srcset="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img103_small-768x492-1.jpg 768w, https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img103_small-768x492-1-300x192.jpg 300w, https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img103_small-768x492-1-600x384.jpg 600w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" data-lazy-src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img103_small-768x492-1.jpg" /><noscript><img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" width="640" height="410" src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img103_small-768x492-1.jpg" class="vc_single_image-img attachment-large" alt="" title="oh__img103_small-768x492" srcset="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img103_small-768x492-1.jpg 768w, https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img103_small-768x492-1-300x192.jpg 300w, https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img103_small-768x492-1-600x384.jpg 600w" sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" /></noscript></div>
		</figure>
	</div>
	</div>
</div><div class="horizontal-accordion-item" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce224ac1">
	<div class="accordion-body">
		<div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_inner vc_row-fluid vc_custom_1643903051694 vc_column-gap-1 vc_row-o-content-middle vc_row-flex"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12 vc_col-has-fill"><div class="vc_column-inner vc_custom_1643903874724"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="vc_empty_space"   style="height: 8vh"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div><div class="vc_separator wpb_content_element vc_separator_align_center vc_sep_width_100 vc_sep_pos_align_center vc_separator_no_text" ><span class="vc_sep_holder vc_sep_holder_l"><span style="border-color:rgb(136,136,136);border-color:rgba(136,136,136,0.8);" class="vc_sep_line"></span></span><span class="vc_sep_holder vc_sep_holder_r"><span style="border-color:rgb(136,136,136);border-color:rgba(136,136,136,0.8);" class="vc_sep_line"></span></span>
</div><div class="ohio-widget process" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce225326" >
    <div class="heading">
        <div class="process-number subtitle">Step 2.</div>
        <h3 class="process-headline title">Written by AI</h3>
    </div>
    <p class="process-description">Autoblogging.ai is the backbone of all our services. Checkout the tool if you've not already.</p>
<p><strong> OpenAI's GPT-3</strong> is used to <strong>generate</strong> the content. This AI writer makes sure <strong>content is readable</strong>, and <strong>Grammatically correct</strong>. Also, the <strong>article is unique</strong>.</p>
</div></div></div></div></div>
	<div  class="wpb_single_image wpb_content_element vc_align_left">
		
		<figure class="wpb_wrapper vc_figure">
			<div class="vc_single_image-wrapper   vc_box_border_grey"><img decoding="async" width="640" height="410" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20640%20410'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="vc_single_image-img attachment-large" alt="" title="oh__img100_small-768x492" data-lazy-srcset="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img100_small-768x492-1.jpg 768w, https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img100_small-768x492-1-300x192.jpg 300w, https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img100_small-768x492-1-600x384.jpg 600w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" data-lazy-src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img100_small-768x492-1.jpg" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="640" height="410" src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img100_small-768x492-1.jpg" class="vc_single_image-img attachment-large" alt="" title="oh__img100_small-768x492" srcset="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img100_small-768x492-1.jpg 768w, https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img100_small-768x492-1-300x192.jpg 300w, https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img100_small-768x492-1-600x384.jpg 600w" sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" /></noscript></div>
		</figure>
	</div>
	</div>
</div><div class="horizontal-accordion-item" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce2258d7">
	<div class="accordion-body">
		<div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_inner vc_row-fluid vc_custom_1643903059138 vc_column-gap-1 vc_row-o-content-middle vc_row-flex"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12 vc_col-has-fill"><div class="vc_column-inner vc_custom_1643903885477"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="vc_empty_space"   style="height: 8vh"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div><div class="vc_separator wpb_content_element vc_separator_align_center vc_sep_width_100 vc_sep_pos_align_center vc_separator_no_text" ><span class="vc_sep_holder vc_sep_holder_l"><span style="border-color:rgb(136,136,136);border-color:rgba(136,136,136,0.8);" class="vc_sep_line"></span></span><span class="vc_sep_holder vc_sep_holder_r"><span style="border-color:rgb(136,136,136);border-color:rgba(136,136,136,0.8);" class="vc_sep_line"></span></span>
</div><div class="ohio-widget process" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22613f" >
    <div class="heading">
        <div class="process-number subtitle">Step 3.</div>
        <h3 class="process-headline title">On-Page SEO Tweaks</h3>
    </div>
    <p class="process-description">We understand that to <strong>rank for keywords</strong>, and to <strong>attract traffic</strong>, a good writer is not enough.<br />
So, we add some crazy On-Page SEO tweaks!</p>
<p><strong>NLP Keywords</strong> -The system grabs NLP keywords from top-10 search results and uses that to generate the articles.<br />
Additionally, these tweaks are added -<br />
<strong>Automatic Related Video</strong><br />
<strong>Automatic Internal and External Linking</strong><br />
<strong>Automatic Related Tags</strong></p>
</div></div></div></div></div>
	<div  class="wpb_single_image wpb_content_element vc_align_left">
		
		<figure class="wpb_wrapper vc_figure">
			<div class="vc_single_image-wrapper   vc_box_border_grey"><img decoding="async" width="640" height="410" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20640%20410'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="vc_single_image-img attachment-large" alt="" title="oh__img102_small-768x492" data-lazy-srcset="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img102_small-768x492-1.jpg 768w, https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img102_small-768x492-1-300x192.jpg 300w, https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img102_small-768x492-1-600x384.jpg 600w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" data-lazy-src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img102_small-768x492-1.jpg" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="640" height="410" src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img102_small-768x492-1.jpg" class="vc_single_image-img attachment-large" alt="" title="oh__img102_small-768x492" srcset="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img102_small-768x492-1.jpg 768w, https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img102_small-768x492-1-300x192.jpg 300w, https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img102_small-768x492-1-600x384.jpg 600w" sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" /></noscript></div>
		</figure>
	</div>
	</div>
</div><div class="horizontal-accordion-item" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce226734">
	<div class="accordion-body">
		<div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_inner vc_row-fluid vc_custom_1643903066371 vc_column-gap-1 vc_row-o-content-middle vc_row-flex"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12 vc_col-has-fill"><div class="vc_column-inner vc_custom_1643903893239"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="vc_empty_space"   style="height: 8vh"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div><div class="vc_separator wpb_content_element vc_separator_align_center vc_sep_width_100 vc_sep_pos_align_center vc_separator_no_text" ><span class="vc_sep_holder vc_sep_holder_l"><span style="border-color:rgb(136,136,136);border-color:rgba(136,136,136,0.8);" class="vc_sep_line"></span></span><span class="vc_sep_holder vc_sep_holder_r"><span style="border-color:rgb(136,136,136);border-color:rgba(136,136,136,0.8);" class="vc_sep_line"></span></span>
</div><div class="ohio-widget process" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce226fa0" >
    <div class="heading">
        <div class="process-number subtitle">Step 4.</div>
        <h3 class="process-headline title">Add to Drafts/ Publish</h3>
    </div>
    <p class="process-description">Once the articles are generated and optimized, the articles are auto-published/ added to drafts on your sites.</p>
<p><strong>What do we need for that?</strong></p>
<p>We require that you share editor account access to your website and install a WordPress plugin that enables our system to <strong>publish posts remotely</strong>.<br />
You can also set the daily <strong>drip-feed</strong> quantity.</p>
<p><strong>Once the initial setup is done</strong>(which takes hardly 10 minutes),<br />
<strong>it's on auto-pilot!</strong></p>
</div></div></div></div></div>
	<div  class="wpb_single_image wpb_content_element vc_align_left">
		
		<figure class="wpb_wrapper vc_figure">
			<div class="vc_single_image-wrapper   vc_box_border_grey"><img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" width="640" height="410" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20640%20410'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="vc_single_image-img attachment-large" alt="" title="oh__img103_small-768x492" data-lazy-srcset="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img103_small-768x492-1.jpg 768w, https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img103_small-768x492-1-300x192.jpg 300w, https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img103_small-768x492-1-600x384.jpg 600w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" data-lazy-src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img103_small-768x492-1.jpg" /><noscript><img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" width="640" height="410" src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img103_small-768x492-1.jpg" class="vc_single_image-img attachment-large" alt="" title="oh__img103_small-768x492" srcset="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img103_small-768x492-1.jpg 768w, https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img103_small-768x492-1-300x192.jpg 300w, https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/oh__img103_small-768x492-1-600x384.jpg 600w" sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" /></noscript></div>
		</figure>
	</div>
	</div>
</div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row-full-width vc_clearfix"></div><div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid vc_custom_1572968714582 vc_row-has-fill"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="vc_empty_space  clb__section_spacer"   style="height: 90px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row-full-width vc_clearfix"></div><div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid vc_row-o-equal-height vc_row-o-content-middle vc_row-flex"><div class="clb__stretch_content wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-6 vc_col-md-4 vc_col-has-fill"><div class="vc_column-inner vc_custom_1573049093527"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="vc_empty_space  clb__section_spacer"   style="height: 90px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div><div class="ohio-widget heading -left" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce227c8e" >
	
	
			<div class="subtitle">
			Experience		</div>

		
	
	<h3 class="title">

On Over 500 Blogs					</h3>

<div class="vc_empty_space  clb__section_spacer"   style="height: 90px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-1 vc_hidden-sm vc_hidden-xs"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"></div></div></div><div class="wpb_animate_when_almost_visible wpb_fadeInUp fadeInUp wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-6 vc_col-md-7 vc_col-has-fill"><div class="vc_column-inner vc_custom_1573049112028"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="ohio-widget tabs -left" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce228361" data-ohio-tabs="true"  data-options={}>
    <ul class="tabs-nav -unlist titles-typo title" role="tablist">
        <li class="tabs-nav-line"></li>
    </ul>
    <div class="tabs-content">
        <div class="tabs-content-item" data-title="Google Adsense"  id="ohio-custom-69a0dce2283f6">
	<div class="ohio-text-sc" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce228438" >
	<p><span class="JsGRdQ">The most preferred and easy way to make money from blogs is via Google Adsense.</span></p>
</div></div><div class="tabs-content-item" data-title="Amazon Affiliates"  id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22846e">
	<div class="ohio-text-sc" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce2284a1" >
	<p>Add your affiliate tags in the articles, or place native shopping ads in each article..</p>
</div></div><div class="tabs-content-item" data-title="Sponsored Guest Posts"  id="ohio-custom-69a0dce2284cb">
	<div class="ohio-text-sc" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce228500" >
	<p>Accept Guest posts from Brands and Marketers on your Autoblogs.</p>
<p>Publishers usually look for sites which have &#8211;</p>
<ul>
<li>Fresh Content</li>
<li>Fast Indexing of Articles</li>
<li>Good Ahrefs and Moz Stats &#8211; Building a site upon Expired domains is therefore suggested.</li>
</ul>
</div></div><div class="tabs-content-item" data-title="Selling the Site"  id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22853a">
	<div class="ohio-text-sc" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22856f" >
	<p>With Quick proofreading and layout fixes, you can do the following-</p>
<ul>
<li>Sell your  Monetized Site for 25-35x your monthly revenue from Ads/ Commissions.</li>
<li>Sell your Non Monetized Site as a Starter Site with the starting price range of 350$.</li>
</ul>
<p>Good stats on Ahrefs and Moz helps in increasing the selling price.</p>
</div></div>    </div>
</div></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row-full-width vc_clearfix"></div><div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid vc_custom_1572968665683 vc_row-has-fill vc_row-o-equal-height vc_row-o-content-middle vc_row-flex"><div class="wpb_animate_when_almost_visible wpb_fadeInUp fadeInUp wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-6 vc_col-md-7"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="vc_empty_space  clb__section_spacer"   style="height: 90px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div><div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_inner vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12 vc_col-has-fill"><div class="vc_column-inner vc_custom_1580373653691"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="vc_empty_space  clb_custom_empty_space"   style="height: 20vh"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div><div class="vc_empty_space  clb_custom_empty_space"   style="height: 20vh"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_empty_space  clb__section_spacer vc_hidden-xs"   style="height: 90px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-1 vc_hidden-sm vc_hidden-xs vc_col-has-fill"><div class="vc_column-inner vc_custom_1573049130875"><div class="wpb_wrapper"></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-6 vc_col-md-4"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="ohio-widget heading -left" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22962b" >
	
	
			<div class="subtitle">
			Why Autoblogging?		</div>

		
	
	<h3 class="title">
				Use<br class="vc_hidden-xs vc_hidden-sm">
Cases					</h3>

	
		
</div><div class="ohio-text-sc" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce229664" >
	<p>You can setup Autoblogging for the following scenarios</p>
</div><div class="vc_empty_space"   style="height: 10px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div><div class="ohio-widget tabs -left" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22984a" data-ohio-tabs="true"  data-options={}>
    <ul class="tabs-nav -unlist titles-typo title" role="tablist">
        <li class="tabs-nav-line"></li>
    </ul>
    <div class="tabs-content">
        <div class="tabs-content-item" data-title="Money site"  id="ohio-custom-69a0dce229893">
	<div class="ohio-text-sc" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce2298c9" >
	<p><strong>Keep your money site updated with regular content</strong>. Works best with sites with Fast indexing.</p>
</div></div><div class="tabs-content-item" data-title="Pillar content"  id="ohio-custom-69a0dce2298f9">
	<div class="ohio-text-sc" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22992d" >
	<p><strong>Add niche relevant content to your site.</strong></p>
<p>Add manual interlinks later to your money pages.</p>
</div></div><div class="tabs-content-item" data-title="PBNs"  id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22995e">
	<div class="ohio-text-sc" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce229990" >
	<p><strong>Want to keep your PBNs updated? Go for it right away!</strong></p>
<p>Bonus &#8211; These articles might bring in traffic too!</p>
</div></div>    </div>
</div></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row-full-width vc_clearfix"></div><div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="vc_empty_space  clb__section_spacer"   style="height: 90px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row-full-width vc_clearfix"></div><div data-vc-parallax="1.5" data-vc-parallax-image="" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid clb_custom_iconbox_section vc_custom_1574407464094 vc_row-has-fill vc_row-o-equal-height vc_row-flex vc_general vc_parallax vc_parallax-content-moving"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-1 vc_hidden-sm vc_hidden-xs"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12 vc_col-md-3"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="ohio-widget heading -left" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22a497" >
	
	
			<div class="subtitle">
			Autoblogging with AI		</div>

		
	
	<h3 class="title">
				Core <br class="vc_hidden-sm vc_hidden-xs">
features					</h3>

	
		
</div><div class="ohio-text-sc" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22a4d4" >
	<p>We&#8217;ve been Autoblogging ourselves since 2015, and still continue to do so. We started with Spinrewriter/ wordai backed setup. Then moved to AI Spinner, developed by our own team and did that for 2 years. And now, we&#8217;ve moved to AI Writing setup. We&#8217;ve launched a tool &#8211; <a href="https://autoblogging.ai">Autoblogging.ai</a> which you can use to generate articles in real-time, manually.</p>
</div><div class="vc_empty_space"   style="height: 20px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div><div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_inner vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4 vc_col-md-6 vc_col-xs-6"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="ohio-widget counter -right-icon -left" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22aa94" 	data-counter="310">

							</div>
		        <div class="holder">
            <span></span>
			<span class="number">0</span>
			<span></span>
        </div>
    </div>
	    	<p class="-unspace">Autoblogs Live</p>
	</div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4 vc_col-md-6 vc_col-xs-6"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="ohio-widget counter -right-icon -left" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22ac70" 	data-counter="50">
    <div class="counter-number title titles-typo -with-increaser">

	</div></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_inner vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4 vc_col-md-6 vc_col-xs-6"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="ohio-widget counter -right-icon -left" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22b01a" 	data-counter="165">

        </div>
    </div>
	    	<p class="-unspace">Amazon Blogs</p>
	</div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4 vc_col-md-6 vc_col-xs-6"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="ohio-widget counter -right-icon -left" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22b1e1" 	data-counter="400">
    <div class="counter-number title titles-typo -with-increaser">
		            <div class="icon-group">
									<i class="icon left-icon ion ion-md-keypad"></i>
							</div>
		        <div class="holder">
            <span></span>
			<span class="number">0</span>
			<span></span>
        </div>
    </div>
	    	<p class="-unspace">Sites Sold in 2022</p>
	</div></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_empty_space  vc_hidden-lg vc_hidden-md"   style="height: 40px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-1 vc_hidden-sm vc_hidden-xs vc_col-has-fill"><div class="vc_column-inner vc_custom_1577196791850"><div class="wpb_wrapper"></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4 vc_col-md-2 vc_col-xs-6"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="ohio-widget icon-box -left -left-flex" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22b8a7" >

			
		<span class="icon-group -contained">
							<img width="64" height="64" decoding="async" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2064%2064'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 64px) 100vw, 64px" alt="Grammatically Correct" data-lazy-src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/IconDemo5__6.png" ><noscript><img width="64" height="64" decoding="async" src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/IconDemo5__6.png" srcset="" sizes="(max-width: 64px) 100vw, 64px" alt="Grammatically Correct" ></noscript>
					</span>
		<div class="icon-box-content">
			<h5 class="icon-box-heading">Grammatically Correct</h5>
			<p>The articles generated usually gets a 7th Grade Readability score from Grammarly and Hemmingway app.</p>
					</div>

	
</div><div class="vc_empty_space  clb__spacer"   style="height: 60px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div><div class="ohio-widget icon-box -left -left-flex" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22bbcf" >

			
		<span class="icon-group -contained">
							<img width="64" height="64" decoding="async" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2064%2064'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 64px) 100vw, 64px" alt="Niche Confidentiality" data-lazy-src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/IconDemo5__3.png" ><noscript><img width="64" height="64" decoding="async" src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/IconDemo5__3.png" srcset="" sizes="(max-width: 64px) 100vw, 64px" alt="Niche Confidentiality" ></noscript>
					</span>
		<div class="icon-box-content">
			<h5 class="icon-box-heading">Niche Confidentiality</h5>
			<p>Niche research is very much time consuming and hard.<br />
Anyone on our team has no intentions to steal your niche.<br />
We launch sites based on expired domains that we find, and not niches.</p>
					</div>

	
</div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4 vc_col-md-2 vc_col-xs-6"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="ohio-widget icon-box -left -left-flex" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22bf3f" >

			
		<span class="icon-group -contained">
							<img width="52" height="68" decoding="async" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2052%2068'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 52px) 100vw, 52px" alt="On Page SEO" data-lazy-src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/IconDemo5__1.png" ><noscript><img width="52" height="68" decoding="async" src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/IconDemo5__1.png" srcset="" sizes="(max-width: 52px) 100vw, 52px" alt="On Page SEO" ></noscript>
					</span>
		<div class="icon-box-content">
			<h5 class="icon-box-heading">On Page SEO</h5>
			<p>We've implemented tweaks that optimizes the articles for SEO. We've literally outranked a lot of authority sites for low/ med competition keywords with such automated tweaks.</p>
					</div>

	
</div><div class="vc_empty_space  clb__spacer"   style="height: 60px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div><div class="ohio-widget icon-box -left -left-flex" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22c26c" >

			
		<span class="icon-group -contained">
							<img width="44" height="52" decoding="async" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2044%2052'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 44px) 100vw, 44px" alt="Tailored Packages" data-lazy-src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/IconDemo5__2.png" ><noscript><img width="44" height="52" decoding="async" src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/IconDemo5__2.png" srcset="" sizes="(max-width: 44px) 100vw, 44px" alt="Tailored Packages" ></noscript>
					</span>
		<div class="icon-box-content">
			<h5 class="icon-box-heading">Tailored Packages</h5>
			<p>We understand that everyone has a different strategy of running blogs on scale. We tailor our processes accordingly. Example, if you wish to get the outputs in a csv/ excel sheet, That can be done as well.</p>
					</div>

	
</div><div class="vc_empty_space  clb__spacer vc_hidden-sm vc_hidden-md vc_hidden-lg"   style="height: 60px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div></div></div></div><div class="clb_custom_mobile_icons wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4 vc_col-md-2 vc_col-xs-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="ohio-widget icon-box -left -left-flex" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22c70b" >

			
		<span class="icon-group -contained">
							<img width="46" height="56" decoding="async" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2046%2056'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 46px) 100vw, 46px" alt="Dripfeed" data-lazy-src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/IconDemo5__5.png" ><noscript><img width="46" height="56" decoding="async" src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/IconDemo5__5.png" srcset="" sizes="(max-width: 46px) 100vw, 46px" alt="Dripfeed" ></noscript>
					</span>
		<div class="icon-box-content">
			<h5 class="icon-box-heading">Dripfeed</h5>
			<p>Drip-feeding is strongly suggested. We've experienced that blogs with daily 3-5 articles, spread out over 6 months tend to perform the best.</p>
					</div>

	
</div><div class="vc_empty_space  clb__spacer"   style="height: 60px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div><div class="ohio-widget icon-box -left -left-flex" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22ca14" >

			
		<span class="icon-group -contained">
							<img width="55" height="60" decoding="async" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2055%2060'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 55px) 100vw, 55px" alt="Regular Updates" data-lazy-src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/IconDemo5__4.png" ><noscript><img width="55" height="60" decoding="async" src="https://digimetriq.com/wp-content/uploads/IconDemo5__4.png" srcset="" sizes="(max-width: 55px) 100vw, 55px" alt="Regular Updates" ></noscript>
					</span>
		<div class="icon-box-content">
			<h5 class="icon-box-heading">Regular Updates</h5>
			<p>We're constantly improving when it comes to AI writing quality and on-page optimizations. On an average, 3 new features are added/ or improved every month.</p>
					</div>

	
</div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-1 vc_hidden-sm vc_hidden-xs"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"></div></div></div></div><div data-vc-full-width="true" data-vc-full-width-init="false" class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="vc_empty_space  clb__section_spacer"   style="height: 90px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div></div></div></div></div><div class="vc_row-full-width vc_clearfix"></div><section class="vc_section"><div class="vc_row wpb_row vc_row-fluid"><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12"><div class="vc_column-inner"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="ohio-widget heading -center" id="ohio-custom-69a0dce22d8e6" >

	<h3 class="title">
				If not us, Listen to them!					</h3>
